title: caladenia toxochila
intro: Caladenia toxochila, also known as the Midge Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Western Australia. While it has been used in traditional medicine, its medicinal properties and health benefits are still being researched, and it is not commonly used as a treatment for specific health conditions. However, it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. In traditional herbal preparations, the Midge Orchid has been used in teas and infusions, although its use is largely anecdotal and not scientifically proven.
